description: Helm chart name, version, and description can now be configured exclusively via the `WithHelm()` extension using new `WithChartName()` and `WithChartDescription()` overloads on `HelmChartOptions`. The previous `WithProperties(k => k.HelmChartName = ...)` API has been removed — `HelmChartName`, `HelmChartVersion`, and `HelmChartDescription` are now internal.
name: Consolidate Helm chart options on `WithHelm()`
